name: agent-skills
description: Addy Osmani's agent-skills slash commands in GitHub Copilot Chat — /spec, /plan, /build, /test, /review, /ship, /simplify

commands.name: spec
commands.description: Start spec-driven development — write a structured specification before any code

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Break a spec into small, ordered tasks with acceptance criteria

commands.name: build
commands.description: Implement the next pending task — RED→GREEN→commit using TDD

commands.name: test
commands.description: Run the TDD cycle for new features, or the Prove-It pattern for bug fixes

commands.name: review
commands.description: Five-axis code review: correctness, readability, architecture, security, performance

commands.name: ship
commands.description: Pre-launch checklist with code, security, and test review → GO/NO-GO decision

commands.name: simplify
commands.description: Reduce code complexity without changing behavior — one change at a time with test verification

commands.name: story
commands.description: Plan a feature as a story with sequenced chapter branches — structured for human reviewers

commands.name: visualize
commands.description: Generate a Mermaid change map and before/after narrative for a PR — written for junior developers

commands.name: rescue
commands.description: Decompose an oversized prototype branch into a story with reviewable chapter branches
